Off Calendar Jan-06-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT BHAZUBHAI PATEL'S MOTION TO DISMISS [CCP 583.310].
Appearances: Brian F. Crossman of the Office of the City Attorney (554.4690) for plaintiff and responding party; James B. Kraus of Zachs & Utrecht (956.8100) for defendant and moving party.
Discussed and the court adopted its tentative ruling as modified: Granted as to the complaint only. No opposition filed. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077
